paths.title: Junior High School
paths.description: Localized MATATAG Curriculum focused on Blaan heritage integration.

paths.title: Senior High School
paths.description: Specialized tracks including Academic and TVL Track.

virtual_tour.title: Explore Our Unified Campus
virtual_tour.description: Upper Labay High School offers a single, vibrant campus environment for all students from Grades 7 through 12. Experience our specialized learning facilities and cultural heritage centers through this video walkthrough.

vision.title: Our Unified Vision
vision.description: Whether in JHS or SHS, our students are immersed in Indigenous Knowledge Systems and Practices (IKSP). We bridge modern academic standards with Blaan ancestral wisdom to produce culturally-rooted leaders.
